description: Scenario matrix for the Godot-Plus Collect-and-Exit demo. It maps acceptance coverage to executable or evidence-backed checks without granting source mutation, command execution, publication, dependency install, credential, or plugin runtime authority.

globalGuardrails.generatedState: Generated demo outputs, runs, dashboard data, screenshots, videos, package bundles, and temp servers stay ignored/untracked unless explicitly fixture-scoped.
globalGuardrails.trustedWriteBoundary: Browser/Studio surfaces are read-only or draft-only; trusted source mutation remains review-gated through Safe Source Apply and is not part of this matrix.
globalGuardrails.releaseBoundary: No commercial release, public deploy, signing, app-store/Steam/itch publishing, production-ready claim, native/mobile/console export, dependency install, credentials, CI/workflow mutation, executable plugin runtime, marketplace, or network plugin install/update.
globalGuardrails.wordingBoundary: Godot-plus means scoped evidence-native workflow demonstration, not full Godot replacement, full parity, universal superiority, secure sandbox, or production readiness.

scenarios.title: Start game
acceptanceCriteria: player starts alive at deterministic spawn
failCriteria: player spawn is absent or nondeterministic

scenarios.title: Move player
passCriteria: player x position increases after deterministic right input

scenarios.title: Complete level
failCriteria: exit can be reached without key

scenarios.title: Fail and restart/checkpoint
acceptanceCriteria: browser has no trusted write authority
passCriteria: runtime-save-artifact-v1 reload resets key_collected and exit_reached

scenarios.title: Enemy / system interaction
acceptanceCriteria: hazard drone has deterministic dormant/armed transition
passCriteria: behavior schema is source-like and declarative

scenarios.title: Objective update
acceptanceCriteria: key, door, and exit objective flags update in order
failCriteria: scenario assertions do not bind to flags

scenarios.title: UI / HUD state
acceptanceCriteria: HUD shows objective, key, and health state
feedback is derived from runtime flags
passCriteria: HUD rows bind goal, key, health

scenarios.title: Runtime probe state
passCriteria: level-set smoke confirms current level id and scenario links
failCriteria: probe needs browser command bridge or arbitrary shell

scenarios.title: Export smoke
acceptanceCriteria: local web export profile is declared
failCriteria: profile includes credentials or public deploy

scenarios.title: Studio walkthrough
passCriteria: asset inspector renders runtime load evidence
dashboard renders HUD values and asset preview

scenarios.title: Plugin validation
acceptanceCriteria: no executable plugin runtime or marketplace behavior

scenarios.title: Evidence bundle
acceptanceCriteria: evidence links world state, logs/events, dashboard/Studio, assets, export/profile, and scenario verdicts
passCriteria: all evidence artifact kinds are declared
generated roots runs/target/dashboard-data/dist are absent from fixture

qaSwarmUse.note: Future QA swarm/regression issues may select scenarios by id and run the listed verification refs, but this matrix does not grant auto-fix, auto-apply, merge, command bridge, dependency install, credential, release, or plugin runtime authority.
